Meta is removing support for Nielsen's Designated Market Area (DMA) dimension in ad reporting and replacing it with Comscore Market."},{"url":"https://searchengineland.com/meta-expands-live-shopping-ads-and-virtual-card-checkout-to-drive-more-purchases-480532","title":"Meta expands live shopping ads and virtual card checkout to drive more purchases","content":"Meta is introducing new commerce features across Facebook and Instagram as it looks to turn more AI-driven product discovery into completed purchases.
Starting this summer, Meta will roll out a virtual card payment option on Facebook and Instagram in partnership with Mastercard and Visa.
The feature generates temporary, one-time card numbers linked to a shopper’s existing payment card, allowing users to complete purchases without sharing their actual card details with merchants."},{"url":"https://www.thekeyword.co/news/meta-live-video-ads-instagram","title":"Meta Rolling Out Live Video Ads to Instagram","content":"The change is part of a wider set of commerce updates Meta announced ahead of next week's Cannes Lions, spanning live video, creator affiliate tools, checkout, and AI-built ad formats.
Meta is widening its affiliate program, adding Flipkart in India and Mercado Libre in Brazil and Mexico, with Lazada coming to Facebook creators in Asia and Flipkart reaching Instagram creators in India.
The affiliate and catalog-discovery features echo creator-commerce models on TikTok and YouTube.
TikTok has continued to automate its own shopping ads, including recent updates to its GMV Max tool.
Eligible livestreams can be converted into ads, and in the U.S. sellers can do this through live commerce partners including CommentSold, Firework, LiveMeUp, Sprii, and TalkShopLive."},{"url":"https://www.androidheadlines.com/2026/06/meta-instagram-facebook-live-ads-virtual-cards-ai.html","title":"Meta Brings Live Video Ads and AI Shopping Tools","content":"Key features include the global rollout of Live Video Ads, partnerships with livestream platforms, and a new secure checkout system using temporary virtual cards via Mastercard and Visa.
Ahead of its appearance at the Cannes Lions festival, Meta announced a major suite of e-shopping upgrades designed to keep you shopping without ever leaving Facebook or Instagram by mixing live broadcasting, influencer partnerships, and AI.
From there, Meta’s AI algorithms automatically piece together and optimize custom ad variations tailored to individual users in real time."}]}
